Consulting/Advisory Services

Our Team is always ready, no matter what you need. Connect with an expert today.

Advisory solutions

At Namaca, we’re committed to providing multidisciplinary, agile financial advisory solutions that respond to the complexity of your business’ needs today while simultaneously pursuing tomorrow’s opportunities.

Financial Advisory

Our combination of accounting and financial systems advisory helps address your most pertinent issues. Navigate accounting challenges seamlessly with our collaborative team, delivering technical expertise to support your organization's growth.

Risk Advisory

Your business has plenty of risks to monitor, and as the stakes get higher ‒ sophisticated data breaches, demands for transparency, IPO opportunities ‒ robust risk management policies become more essential.

Valuation Advisory

NamacaValuation Group is known for its comprehensive services, industry expertise and professionalism. As one of the largest independent valuation firms in the US, NamacaValuation Group has handled assignments for some of the nation’s largest companies.

Private Equity Advisory

NamacaPrivate Equity Advisory is the premier transaction, transition, and transformation solutions partner for middle-market private equity firms and their operating companies.

Forensic Consulting

No matter what issues you may encounter, the Namaca professionals are here to assist you. With our multidisciplinary team, you have access to individuals with backgrounds in accounting, valuation and litigation with the credentials and expertise needed to get the job done.

Tomorrow’s Trusted Advisor, Today

With more than 500 dedicated advisory professionals nationwide, you have
near-immediate access to financial specialists who will partner with you to strategically manage through transactions, mitigate risk, address regulatory matters, capitalize on growth opportunities and advise on other success-critical business needs.

Because of our collaborative team approach, you’ll benefit from innovative strategies that address your business holistically, helping you to focus on what matters most — supporting your people, outpacing your competitors, and growing your business.

Health Care consulting solutions

Enterprise Modeling &
Operational Consulting

Receive assistance with accounting outsourcing, financial modeling, and other services to assist with decision-making.

Transaction Due Diligence

Utilize our experience with physician practice and hospital joint ventures, acquisitions, and divestitures and explore our range of solutions to assist complex transactions, from due diligence to post-sale transition support.

Hospital & Health Care System Services

Hospitals and health systems receive assistance with the intricacies of revenue assurance, Medicaid eligibility, and compliance.

Valuation

Pinpoint the value of key tangible and intangible assets involved in mergers, acquisitions, joint ventures, physician compensation, and property records through our healthcare valuation services.

Begin your journey now by taking the first step forward

01

Start a conversation

Let’s get to know each other – fill out a simple online questionnaire and we’ll schedule a free Zoom call. We’ll get to know your business better, and explore whether we’re the right fit for one another.

02

Showing you the way

If we decide to work together after our discovery call, we’ll have a second free call to walk you through our process, familiarize you with the apps we use, and discuss a plan that’s tailored to your company’s needs – both for the immediate and the future.

03

Kicking things off

Onboarding can be a little scary, but we’ll handle the process from A-Z for you. We’ll introduce you to your new team of dedicated accountants, then give you a little refresher on how the process works and how to use the different technologies. Now’s when things really take off: we start handling your day-to-day accounting so you can focus on growing your business.

04

Checking up

Our goal is to continually make improvements to our process to best meet your company’s needs. Over the first few months we’ll check up regularly to ensure you are fully comfortable with the new setup, and make any necessary tweaks to make sure things are as efficient and lean as possible.

content.rendered:
Accounts Receivable Services

Namaca is one of the best accounts receivable outsourcing company in Canada and helps them to take control of their cash flow. We make use of different accounts receivable software to help Canadian businesses with accounts receivable, ensuring that they do not turn into bad debt.

Accounts receivable service for enhanced business cash flow

One of the most considerable assets on a balance sheet is Account Receivable. Even though most businesses are aware of its significance, it fails to perform this task efficiently. Businesses are not able to allocate their time and resource efficiently for accounts receivable.

Most of the businesses are focused so much on acquiring new customers and then delivering the product and services to the customer that they end up spending a significant chunk of time and effort on the same. They end up neglecting to collect the receivables, which might cause an obstruction in the cash flow and can result in causing debts for the company.

Benefits of outsourcing Accounts receivable services

Increase Efficiency

With an outsourced partner, you can focus your time, effort, and money on acquiring new customers instead of spending on the accounts receivable process.

Cost-Effective

An Outsourced Accounts Receivable Service cost as compared to hiring in house resources or Chartered Accountant will be much affordable.

Reduce DSO

Days Sales Outstanding is reduced by ensuring every sale is recorded and receivables are collected, keeping in mind the outstanding days.

Client Relationships

Outsource partner creates a positive barrier between you and your clients, helping maintain healthy relationships.

Accounts receivable management services By Namaca

  • Maintaining a record of the bills
  • Record of received payments
  • Constant follow-ups with debtors for pending invoices
  • Regular billing and delivery to customers
  • Adjusting the payments with invoices
  • Discounting the debtors
  • Creation of invoice
  • Linking Payment Gateways and the Accounting software
  • In-depth analysis of accounts receivable reports

Frequently asked questions

What is Accounts Receivable?

When your customers buy goods or services on credit, the amount due by all your customers makes up the accounts receivable. Accounts receivable is a current asset of your business. These payments are yet to be received by specific due dates hence the name receivable. While it is best to avoid selling products or services on credit, it is inevitable to run a business. Payment made on an immediate basis is good for the business but not practically possible as you have to match up to the credit period offering by competitors in the industry.

What is Days Sales Outstanding (DSO)?

content.rendered:
Services de Comptes Fournisseurs

Nous pouvons également vous aider à calculer différents indicateurs clés de performance qui propulsent votre entreprise vers l'avant et, si vous avez besoin de dresser un tableau pour les investisseurs ou de faire un rapport au conseil d'administration, nous pouvons également vous aider à préparer ce type de rapports.

Services de comptes fournisseurs en ligne pour rationaliser vos paiements.

Les comptes fournisseurs sont une forme de crédit que votre entreprise peut obtenir de vos fournisseurs. Cela permet un paiement différé pour les produits ou services que votre entreprise utilise. Les comptes fournisseurs ne doivent en aucun cas être ignorés, car cela ne ferait que perturber le flux de trésorerie et ruiner les relations avec vos fournisseurs. Cela affecte également votre fonds de roulement, ce qui entraînera une réduction du bénéfice global.

Une période de crédit est accordée par les créanciers et les fournisseurs, et dans certains cas, vous pouvez bénéficier d’une remise si le paiement est effectué avant la date d’échéance. Cependant, ne pas payer à temps peut poser un problème plus important, comme la violation des conditions de paiement avec vos fournisseurs, ce qui pourrait entraîner des problèmes juridiques pour votre entreprise.

Avantages de l'externalisation des services de comptes fournisseurs.

Augmenter l'efficacité

Externaliser des tâches banales mais importantes comme les comptes fournisseurs vous aide à vous concentrer sur la croissance globale de votre entreprise.

Réduire les coûts de personnel

La tarification de l’externalisation des comptes fournisseurs, comparée à l’embauche de ressources internes ou à un CA externe, est bien plus rentable.

Suivi continu

Lorsque vous engagez un partenaire externalisé, il est responsable du suivi continu, ce qui aide à régler les comptes fournisseurs à temps.

Sans erreur

Un partenaire externalisé utilise un logiciel d’automatisation des comptes fournisseurs qui permet de réduire les erreurs.

Avantages offerts par Namaca

Namaca est l’une des principales entreprises d’externalisation des comptes fournisseurs  Voici quelques avantages dont vous pouvez bénéficier avec Namaca –

  • Paiement rapide des factures
  • Confidentialité des données partagées
  • Rapports mensuels, trimestriels et annuels
  • Vérification croisée des chèques émis avec la facture payée
  • Respecter la conformité avec le paiement à temps
  • Experts sans frais généraux
  • Accès sûr et sécurisé à vos données
  • Pas d'investissement en capital dans des logiciels coûteux
  • Numérisation des documents de comptes fournisseurs

Frequently asked questions

What is Accounts Payable?

Businesses purchase goods or services from their suppliers on credit, which has to be paid within the agreed-upon period. It is inevitable for a business to purchase on credit at one point or another. The amount one has to pay to their suppliers or creditors forms a part of accounts payable. Accounts payable is a liability for businesses.

content.rendered:
CFO Services

We can also help you calculate different KPIs that drive your business forward and, if you need to paint a picture for investors or report to the board, we can also help knock up these types of report packs.

We provide comprehensive and reliable financial support

By outsourcing your accounting needs to our experienced team, you can focus on core operations while we handle the financial aspects of your business.

Bookkeeping

We handle day-to-day financial transactions, including data entry, reconciliations, and financial record maintenance, ensuring accurate and up-to-date books.

Financial Reporting

We prepare regular financial reports, including income statements, balance sheets, and AR/AP summaries, providing you with clear insights into your business's financial performance.

Accounts Payable and Receivable Management

We handle vendor payments, invoice processing, and collections, helping you effectively manage your payables and receivables.

Financial Analysis

We perform in-depth financial analysis, trend analysis, and variance analysis, to help you make informed decisions and identify areas for improvement.

Cash Flow Management

We monitor your cash flow, project future cash needs, and provide recommendations to optimize cash flow and working capital management.

Budgeting and Forecasting

We assist in developing budgets, creating financial forecasts, and monitoring actual performance against projected targets, helping you set realistic goals and make informed financial decisions.

Customized Reporting

We tailor financial reports and key performance indicators (KPIs) to meet your specific needs, providing you with the right information to assess the health of your business.

CFO Services and Business
Advisory

We leverage cloud-based accounting software to streamline processes, enhance collaboration, and provide you with real-time access to your financial data from anywhere.

What is Fractional CFO

Tax planning is a critical component of financial management, and it involves structuring your financial situation in a way that minimizes your tax liability while still meeting your income tax obligations. This can help you to achieve your financial goals and objectives, and to maximize your wealth and success.

At Namaca, we understand the importance of financial modeling in tax planning, and we are dedicated to providing comprehensive financial modeling services to our clients. Our team of experienced tax professionals will use financial modeling to test and forecast the impact of various financial decisions, allowing you to make more informed and confident tax planning decisions.

Why companies like yours choose Namaca

Dedicated Accountants

Your focus should be on growing your business, plain and simple. Our focus is your success, which means we need to be accessible and responsive. We make sure that a quick turnaround for any accounting or tax question is a top priority.

Fixed Pricing

Our focus is on quality, not how many hours we can spend on a deliverable. In turn, you pay for a result, not for time spent.

Automated and Paperless

Filing folders, cabinets, shoes boxes… time to forget them. Your team of virtual accountants uses smart tech that automates parts of the accounting process, which means everything is totally paperless. Less work, less waste, and less harmful for the environment.

Pain free Accounting

Is that even possible? Yep – our approach combines cutting-edge tech with industry expertise, which means we’ve kicked all the complicated, sluggish parts of old-school accounting to the curb.

Tax planning and Strategies

We can look into easing the tax burden by optimizing your corporate structure and analyzing whether paying you a dividend, a salary, or a blend of both makes sense. If your company's going through a change or reorganization, we can work with you on the tax side of things.

Minimize risks, and take advantage of available tax benefits

We ensure comprehensive tax advisory and planning services to optimize your tax strategy and minimize liabilities. Our experienced tax professionals stay up-to-date with ever-changing tax laws and regulations to provide you with tailored guidance and proactive tax planning.

Tax Planning
Strategies

We develop customized tax strategies to help you maximize deductions, credits, and exemptions, ensuring optimal tax savings while staying compliant with tax laws.

Entity Selection and
Structuring

We advise on the most advantageous entity structure for your business, considering factors such as tax implications, liability protection, and operational efficiency.

Tax
Compliance

We assist with tax compliance, preparing and filing accurate and timely tax returns for individuals, businesses, trusts, and estates, ensuring compliance with all applicable tax laws.

Tax Credits and
Incentives

We identify eligible tax credits and incentives specific to your industry or circumstances, helping you take advantage of available opportunities to reduce tax liabilities.

Tax Advisory and
Consultation

We serve as your trusted advisors, providing proactive advice and consultation on various tax matters, answering your questions, and guiding you through complex tax issues.

CPA tax planning advice

Our tax preparation and planning services will make sure that you are taking advantage of all the tax benefits available to you, not just when it comes time to file your tax returns, but all year round.

  • Lower your tax bracket
  • Defer or shift income
  • Reduce your marginal tax rate
  • Reduce taxes on investments
  • Establish tax-reducing retirement accounts
  • Maximize tax deductions
  • Our value innovation eliminates the need for businesses to choose between traditional premium accounting and low-cost freelancers. Instead, we offer CFO-level services at the price of bookkeeping, complete with modern financial statements.

What Is Tax planning?

Tax planning is a critical component of financial management, and it involves structuring your financial situation in a way that minimizes your tax liability while still meeting your income tax obligations. This can help you to achieve your financial goals and objectives, and to maximize your wealth and success.

At Namaca, we understand the importance of financial modeling in tax planning, and we are dedicated to providing comprehensive financial modeling services to our clients. Our team of experienced tax professionals will use financial modeling to test and forecast the impact of various financial decisions, allowing you to make more informed and confident tax planning decisions.

Why companies like yours choose Namaca

Dedicated Accountants

Your focus should be on growing your business, plain and simple. Our focus is your success, which means we need to be accessible and responsive. We make sure that a quick turnaround for any accounting or tax question is a top priority.

Fixed Pricing

Our focus is on quality, not how many hours we can spend on a deliverable. In turn, you pay for a result, not for time spent.

Automated and Paperless

Filing folders, cabinets, shoes boxes… time to forget them. Your team of virtual accountants uses smart tech that automates parts of the accounting process, which means everything is totally paperless. Less work, less waste, and less harmful for the environment.

Pain free Accounting

Is that even possible? Yep – our approach combines cutting-edge tech with industry expertise, which means we’ve kicked all the complicated, sluggish parts of old-school accounting to the curb.

content.rendered:
Payroll Processing

tech-focused cloud technology and person-led payroll expertise to ensure that this part of your business runs as smoothly as the accounting does. We offer payroll processing and support, and help with all those year-end filings such as workers' compensation, T4s, RL1s, along with many others.

Roadblocks in Payroll management

Paying your employees on time is one of the key aspects that keeps the business alive. Prudent Accountants offers the best payroll processing services in the market. We know keeping a check on the liabilities and salaries may become tedious. That’s why we make it easy for you to meet your legal, payroll, and tax obligations.

Time-consuming

Payroll management is a time-consuming and tedious process, whether it is performing manually or using the software. Chances of error in both cases are quite high.

Compliance

There are certain compliances that businesses have to make sure of for different kinds of employees. And also, one has to keep updated with laws and regulations in regards to the payroll management.

Accuracy

There are various kinds of human resources – full-time, part-time, interns, contractors, and so on. This only adds up to the intricacy of the process leading to increase chances of inaccuracy.

Fraudulence

Fraudulence like ghost employees, falsified wages and commission, or even fake insurance claims can impact your organization as well as lead to a compliance issue.

Dedicated Team

Organizations in Canada generally does not have a Payroll Processing team or a personnel. It is performed either by HR or/and finance department which is not suggested as it hampers productivity.

Cost Implications

Payroll management requires the use of technology to reduce errors in the process. But investment in either a payroll system or in-house experts resources can be a costly affair for the business.

Payroll management services we offer

Namaca as an outsourced payroll service provider offers the following
services :

  • Payroll data entry, payroll data processing including tax calculation
  • On-time payslip generation and emailing
  • Calculating the exact amount due to employees after deduction of taxes
  • Recordkeeping & administration
  • Map the timesheets and prepare employee payslips, salary, and PF
  • Our value innovation eliminates the need for businesses to choose between traditional premium accounting and low-cost freelancers. Instead, we offer CFO-level services at the price of bookkeeping, complete with modern financial statements.

Payroll services for effective & efficient organizational human resource management

Payroll generally is an operating expense for businesses provided the human resource employed contributes to the manufacturing or service process of your product and service. A business can not neglect the payroll function as it is a function that helps to calculate the total amount the company needs to pay to its employees for a certain period. Paying the employees on time and accurately can be a tedious task for small and medium businesses, but that being said, it can not be avoided as doing so will lead to employee dissatisfaction and penalties from the government.

Payroll management can be a time-consuming activity with a task like mapping timesheets, preparing employee pay slip, salary, PF and much more. The best way to take care of your payroll management is to outsource this function.

content.rendered:
Bookkeeping services

This is where the pain starts, but there's’ no getting around it – and, done properly, bookkeeping opens the door to effective decision making.

Nos services de comptabilité

En tirant parti de nos services de comptabilité, vous pouvez rationaliser vos processus financiers, maintenir des dossiers précis et avoir la confiance nécessaire pour prendre des décisions financières éclairées. Concentrez-vous sur la croissance de votre entreprise pendant que nous nous occupons de vos besoins en comptabilité.

Reconciliation bancaire

Nous rapprochons vos relevés bancaires de vos dossiers financiers, en veillant à ce que toutes les transactions soient enregistrées avec précision et que les écarts soient rapidement résolus.

Maintenance du grand livre

Nous assurons également la maintenance de votre grand livre général pour garantir l'exactitude et la conformité de tous vos enregistrements financiers. Cela inclut la gestion des écritures de journal, le suivi des actifs et des passifs, et la réconciliation des comptes afin d'offrir une image claire de votre situation financière.

Suivi des dépenses

Notre service de suivi des dépenses vous permet de garder une trace précise de toutes vos sorties d'argent. Nous enregistrons chaque transaction, classons les dépenses par catégorie et fournissons des rapports détaillés pour vous aider à mieux gérer votre budget et à optimiser vos coûts.

Saisie et organisation de données

Nous offrons également des services de saisie et d'organisation de données pour s'assurer que toutes vos informations financières sont enregistrées de manière systématique et accessibles. Nous nous occupons de la saisie des factures, des reçus et des autres documents financiers, tout en organisant ces données pour une consultation facile et rapide.

Enregistrement des ventes et des revenus

Nos services d'enregistrement des ventes et des revenus vous aident à suivre toutes vos sources de revenus de manière précise et exhaustive. Nous enregistrons chaque vente effectuée, analysons les tendances de revenus et fournissons des rapports détaillés pour soutenir vos stratégies de croissance et de gestion financière.

Configuration du plan comptable

Nous vous assistons dans la configuration de votre plan comptable, une étape cruciale pour assurer une gestion financière organisée et efficace. Notre service comprend la création et la structuration des comptes de manière à refléter fidèlement les activités et les besoins spécifiques de votre entreprise. Nous veillons à ce que votre plan comptable soit complet, facile à comprendre et conforme aux normes comptables en vigueur. Grâce à une classification rigoureuse des comptes, vous pourrez suivre vos actifs, passifs, recettes et dépenses avec une clarté optimale, facilitant ainsi la prise de décisions financières stratégiques.

Rapport financier

Rapports Financiers Notre service de rapports financiers vous offre une vision claire et détaillée de votre situation économique. Nous préparons des états financiers précis, y compris des bilans, des comptes de résultat, des états de flux de trésorerie et des rapports de gestion. Ces documents sont essentiels pour évaluer la santé financière de votre entreprise, identifier les tendances et prendre des décisions éclairées. Nous veillons à ce que tous les rapports soient conformes aux normes comptables en vigueur, vous permettant ainsi de présenter des informations financières fiables et transparentes à vos parties prenantes.

Services de comptabilité professionnelle pour votre entreprise

En tirant parti de nos services de comptabilité, vous pouvez rationaliser vos processus financiers, maintenir des dossiers précis et avoir la confiance nécessaire pour prendre des décisions financières éclairées. Concentrez-vous sur la croissance de votre entreprise pendant que nous nous occupons de vos besoins en comptabilité.

content.rendered:
We are healthcare accounting and consulting

Healthcare is our largest niche. It's what we're known for. And that's why so many providers choose us to be their partner.

Qui nous soutenons

We currently serve more than 1,500 healthcare providers, covering everything from hospitals and physician groups to post-acute care facilities, dental practices, and pharmacies. We have more than 145 experienced professionals dedicated specifically to healthcare that will serve you with a deep and comprehensive understanding of the industry’s administrative, organizational, and financial needs.

Nous fournissons des services de comptabilité spécialisés pour améliorer l'efficacité de la gestion financière

Optimiser les opérations financières et assurer la conformité réglementaire dans le secteur de la santé. Nous comprenons l’importance d’optimiser les opérations financières et d’assurer la conformité dans un environnement réglementaire en constante évolution.

Gestion du cycle des revenus

Nous optimisons le cycle des revenus depuis l'enregistrement des patients jusqu'à la soumission des demandes et la publication des paiements, y compris la gestion des refus et le traitement des appels

Gestion des flux de trésorie

Notre équipe surveille les flux de trésorerie, gère les dépenses et prévoit les besoins financiers pour soutenir les opérations quotidiennes et les investissements dans la croissance de la pratique

Gestion de la facturation et de comptes clients

Our team handles patient billing, insurance claims processing, and accounts receivable management to facilitate timely payment for services rendered.

Traitement de la paie

Nous calculons et traitons la paie pour le personnel, tout en assurant la conformité avec les taxes et réglementations sur la paie

Comptabilité analytique pour les modalités de traitement

Notre équipe suit et analyse les coûts associés à différents services de santé et modalités de traitement, y compris les ajustements, les thérapies, les services de diagnostic, les procédures dentaires et les traitements de santé mentale

Tax Planning and Strategy

We advise on tax strategies specific to healthcare practices, such as deductions for medical equipment, business expenses, retirement planning, and compliance with healthcare-specific tax regulations.

Information financière et analyse comparative

Nous générons des rapports financiers, y compris des états des résultats, des bilans et des indicateurs clés de performance (KPI) pour évaluer la performance de la pratique et la comparer aux normes de l'industrie

Conformité réglementaire

We assist with compliance matters related to healthcare regulations, HIPAA (Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act), Medicare and Medicaid billing regulations, and other industry-specific requirements

The Financial Intricacies of the Health and Human Services Sector

At Namaca, our healthcare accounting expertise lies in navigating the complex financial landscape of the health and human services sector that includes: Doctor’s clinics, Specialist offices and clinics, Nursing homes and assisted living facilities, Dental offices, Orthodontic offices, Outpatient clinics. We help them face unique challenges in managing their finances.

The intricacies of billing, regulatory compliance, and meticulous cash flow management demand specialized attention. Our expert team offers specialized accounting services tailored to these needs to help you maintain financial health while you prioritize the well-being of your patients.

Le future de la Comptabilité pour les PME et les entreprises en démarrage

Avec notre approche combinant équipe, technique et technologie, Namaca permet aux petites entreprises et aux startups de prendre en charge leurs finances, de connaître les tenants et aboutissants de leur entreprise et de libérer leur potentiel sans se ruiner.

Planifier un appel

Pourquoi nous choisir ?

Bureau propre VS encombré
Accès complet dans le cloud
Gagner en clarté
Au-delà de la comptabilité
Bureau propre VS encombré

Bureau propre vs encombré

  • Remplacer les opérations traditionnelles basées sur le papier par des flux de travail numériques rationalisés
  • Exploiter l’infrastructure basée sur le cloud pour une gestion améliorée des documents
  • Accédez à des données financières complètes via des interfaces numériques intuitives.
  • Maintenez une organisation de l’espace de travail impeccable grâce à des opérations sans papier.
  • Projetez un professionnalisme élevé avec des pratiques comptables modernes.
Accès complet dans le cloud

Accès complet dans le cloud

  • Réduisez la latence opérationnelle grâce au traitement natif du cloud.
  • Exécutez une synchronisation complète des données sur des plateformes intégrées.
  • Mettez en œuvre des mesures de sécurité de niveau entreprise pour les données financières confidentielles.
  • Optimisez l’allocation des ressources grâce à une architecture cloud centralisée.
Gagner en clarté

Gagnez en clarté

  • Notre système utilise le tableau de bord Xero pour des informations financières en temps réel, contrairement aux méthodes de reporting traditionnelles basées sur le papier utilisées par d’autres.
  • Notre système basé sur le cloud garantit que les informations sont accessibles de n’importe où, éliminant ainsi les limitations d’un accès uniquement au bureau.
Au-delà de la comptabilité

Au-delà de la comptabilité

  • Nous simplifions la communication en enregistrant les solutions et en les envoyant via Loom, éliminant ainsi le besoin de réunions chronophages et permettant une plus grande flexibilité.
  • Les rapports du CFO sont livrés via des enregistrements Loom, garantissant des mises à jour claires et efficaces sans les tracas de la planification ou de l’attente des réunions.

Service adapté à vos besoins uniques de petite entreprise

Comptabilité

L’équipe d’experts en comptabilité cloud de Namaca fournit des livres comptables 100% précis sur lesquels vous, votre banquier et vos investisseurs pouvez compter. Notre approche moderne de la comptabilité

100% Online & Tech-Driven

02

No More Re-training

We know the amount of time, money and energy it takes to re-train your bookkeeper and payroll staff. Many small businesses and startups may not even require an in-house bookkeeper. We bet that once you partner with us, you won’t have to worry about hiring another bookkeeper.

03

Gain Clarity

#1 tip from a top-class business mentor is to ‘Gain Clarity’ on Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) and then leave the rest to professionals. That’s precisely what we do: to save you time and provide you with a KPI Dashboard for gaining clarity about your business finances.

04

Beyond Bookkeeping

Namacagoes beyond bookkeeping, offering transformative accounting solutions, including AP & AR, Payroll, Tax, and Fractional CFO services. From real-time insights to expert advice, we empower businesses to thrive without breaking the bank.

05

Expert Solutions

At Namaca, we are focused on 4 key sectors: e-commerce, technology, contractors, and professionals. Our commitment to delivering tailored modern solutions offers the specialized financial support you deserve, setting us apart from one-size-fits-all bookkeeping firms.

06

Value Innovation

Our value innovation eliminates the need for businesses to choose between traditional premium accounting and low-cost freelancers. Instead, we offer CFO-level services at the price of bookkeeping, complete with modern financial statements.
